data.title: Here's How Much $100 Invested In Shell 5 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
data.description:
Shell (NYSE:SHEL) has outperformed the market over the past 5 years by 6.94% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 18.27%. Currently, Shell has a market capitalization of $250.55 billion.

Buying $100 In SHEL: If an investor had bought $100 of SHEL stock 5 years ago, it would be worth $232.65 today based on a price of $89.71 for SHEL at the time of writing.
